result: Completed PG-002 Phase 3-1 — Migration runner with dual SQLite+Pg CI support. All 6 requirements met: (1) bun install completed, (2) drizzle-kit generate produced new migration with runtime_events table, (3) migration loading already works in db.pg.ts, (4) wired auto-migration in db.ts via applyMigrations call on Client init, (5) added pg-test CI job with Postgres 16 service container, (6) typecheck shows no new errors (pre-existing only). Migration test (2/2) passes. Files modified: src/storage/db.ts, packages/opencode/package.json, .github/workflows/test.yml. Files created: migration-pg/20260530202327_chemical_moira_mactaggert/.
